clinical_coherence.notes: 71M East Asian with presentation consistent with high-grade glioma. PMH includes HTN, DM2, hyperlipidemia, BPH. Age 71 is in the peak GBM incidence range. Vitals and clinical details appropriate.

tool_output_consistency.notes: MRI, perfusion, spectroscopy, and pathology all consistent with IDH-wildtype GBM. Molecular profiling complete. CT body excludes metastatic disease.

ground_truth_quality.notes: ICD C71.9 correct. Right frontoparietal location specified. Differential and management clinically sound.

demographic_plausibility.notes: 71M East Asian. Peak age for GBM, male sex. Highly realistic.

educational_value.notes: Fourth straightforward GBM case with similar structure. Demographic diversity (East Asian, older) adds some value but the clinical teaching points are repetitive.

issues_found: Fourth straightforward GBM case with similar structure - significant repetitiveness across S01-S04
strengths: Oldest patient in the GBM series adds age range diversity
East Asian ethnicity adds demographic diversity
